findings.description: `ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext` is the central class discussed throughout s2 (appears in class definition, constructor setup, and all three API call examples) but is absent from s2 hints. Users querying about this class's implementation would not have s2 surfaced.
findings.source_evidence: s2 content references ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext in: the class definition code block, prepareVersion call (`new ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext(userId)`), and the 作成手順 heading '主キークラスの作成（ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext）'.

findings.description: `ApplicationException` is a PascalCase exception class referenced in both `@OnError` annotations within the s2 code examples but is not listed in s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source doRW11AC0302: `@OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "/ss11AC/W11AC0301.jsp")`. Source doRW11AC0304: `@OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "forward://RW11AC0303")`.
